hero.title: Create Twibbon & Campaign Frames Online — Free & Easy
hero.subtitle: The easiest twibbon maker for communities, organizations, and events. Design your own campaign frame, share a unique link, and let supporters create branded photos instantly — no account needed.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three easy steps to create your twibbon campaign
howItWorks.step1Desc: Design your frame or background twibbon with our powerful canvas editor.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get a unique private link and share it only with the people you choose.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Supporters upload their photos and instantly download the twibbon result.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to create professional twibbon campaigns
features.frameDesc: Transparent frame overlay on top of supporter photos. Perfect for branding campaigns.
features.bgDesc: Auto-remove photo background and merge with your campaign background design.
features.privateLinkDesc: Each campaign has a unique link accessible only by those who have it.
features.noAccountDesc: Supporters don't need to create an account. Just open the link, upload, and download.

privacy.title: Why TWIBO.id?
privacy.subtitle: Unlike other platforms, all campaigns on TWIBO.id are 100% private.
privacy.point1: Campaigns don't appear in public search
privacy.point3: Supporter data is safe and protected
privacy.point4: Full control over who can see your campaign

footer.tagline: Private twibbon platform for communities, organizations, and events.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free or upgrade to Premium for full features

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your campaigns
auth.name: Full Name
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.signupSuccess: Account created! Check your email to verify.

dashboard.title: My Campaigns
dashboard.noCampaignsDesc: Create your first twibbon campaign and share it with your community.
dashboard.deleteDesc: will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

campaign.slugWarning: ⚠️ URL slug can only be set once and cannot be changed later.
campaign.typeFrameDesc: Overlay frame on top of supporter photos
campaign.typeBgDesc: Remove photo background and merge with your design
campaign.simulationDesc: Upload a sample photo to simulate the final supporter output.
campaign.requiredFields: Campaign name and slug are required.
campaign.slugTaken: Slug is already used, please choose another one.
campaign.upgradeDesc: Remove watermark and ads from your campaign by upgrading to Premium.

editor.placeholderDesc: Area where supporter photo will be placed
editor.onePlaceholderOnly: Only one placeholder allowed per campaign
editor.frameHint: Upload a transparent frame (PNG). Placeholder = supporter photo area.
editor.backgroundHint: Upload background. Placeholder = supporter photo area.
editor.shortcuts: Shortcuts: Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Shift+Z redo, Delete remove

public.notFoundDesc: This link is invalid or the campaign has been deleted.
public.uploadPrompt: Upload your photo to create your twibbon
public.ownerWatermarkDesc: Upgrade to Premium to remove watermark and ads.
